rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or named constants are provided.
generic_rules: Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation contracts.
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {**... **};` blocks.
Use eq to define Boolean expressions for range comparisons.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Avoid using unresolved AADL property names as AGREE variables.
